message: Clarifier attempts record an empty would_run for built-in ACP reviewers because the stale empty-command branch returns an empty DryRunCommand.
Contract drafter attempts record an empty would_run for built-in ACP reviewers because the stale empty-command branch returns an empty DryRunCommand.
Human would_run output omits ACP adapter env entries, so Claude model/effort pins are not shown in required launch details.
Clarifier attempts record an empty would_run for built-in ACP agents because empty Command now means ACP-only, but the prepare path returns a zero DryRunCommand instead of resolving the ACP adapter.
Contract drafter attempts record an empty would_run for built-in ACP agents instead of the read-only ACP adapter command.
Execute attempt request JSON drops ACP adapter env entries from would_run.
Human would_run output omits ACP adapter env entries.
Clarifier attempt tests still assert the stale CLI-style WouldRun.Stdin path instead of the ACP adapter command/env representation required by the contract.
Contract-drafter attempt tests still assert the stale CLI-style WouldRun.Stdin path instead of ACP adapter launch details.
promptExecutor/newPromptExecutor is now a single-case wrapper around promptFileExecutor.command after CLI transport removal.

SECURITY.md still documents the removed CLI transport and PACTUM_AGENT_TRANSPORT=cli, including stale codex exec / claude -p commands and a false claim that execute plan records the CLI-transport invocation.

docs/install.md still tells users the optional execution prerequisites are the codex and claude CLIs and says pactum doctor checks those commands, but ACP-only built-ins now require the adapter launcher path checked by doctor.
